story: Agraj Enterprise was founded with a single mission — to deliver industrial painting and protective coating solutions that truly protect assets and extend the life of industrial structures. With over 7 years of hands-on experience, we have built a reputation for quality workmanship, strict safety compliance, and on-time project delivery across factories, warehouses, process plants, and heavy industrial sites in Gujarat.
expertise: We specialize in surface preparation, rust removal, corrosion protection, and the full spectrum of industrial coating applications. Our team has successfully executed projects in the most demanding environments — including PPA plants and Caustic Soda plants — where durability and chemical resistance are non-negotiable.
commitment: Every project we undertake is backed by skilled manpower, proven coating techniques, and an uncompromising commitment to safety. We provide durable, cost-effective, and long-lasting solutions that stand the test of time and industrial conditions.
mission: To protect every industrial asset we touch with the highest standard of coating quality, technical expertise, and safety discipline — making our clients' operations more durable and efficient.
vision: To be the most trusted industrial painting and protective coating partner in Gujarat, recognized for our quality, reliability, and safety culture.
